title: Add AI-Image-Generator-Pollinations.ai to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI-Image-Generator-Pollinations.ai](https://github.com/Vitalii-in-IT/AI-Image-Generator-Pollinations.ai-) to image
- Explains API integration between AI-Image-Generator-Pollinations.ai and Pollinations.ai.

Fixes #10039

gist.headline: New Sprout in the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new community-built image generator just landed in the Greenhouse! Built by Vitalii-in-IT, it's a fresh way to interact with our image API.
gist.summary: Added 'AI-Image-Generator-Pollinations.ai' by Vitalii-in-IT to the community apps showcase and Greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore this new open-source image generation interface in the Pollinations ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener in a digital greenhouse, welcoming a new 'app' sprout. The sprout takes the form of a glowing picture frame or canvas, representing an image generator.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a glowing digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron is watering a new code-plant that has sprouted a glowing picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a glowing digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron is watering a new code-plant that has sprouted a glowing picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
